title: Ohara’s Will Survives
description: Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.
scene: Across pages 16, 17, 18, this part follows Nico Olvia, Jaguar D. Saul, Nico Robin, Spandam, Professor Clover. Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: ...!! sorry, Nico Robin... did bat scare ya?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Haa... haa... wait here for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: But I'll JUS' Protect Muh friend...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Olvia
dialogue.text: I WON'T LET YA GET AWAY...!!!

summary: Jaguar D. Saul protects Robin and gives her the will to keep living, even as Ohara is lost.
